subject: [PATCH v2 1/3] btrfs: move reclaiming of a single block group into its own function

reviews.author: Boris Burkov
reviews.summary: Raised a minor concern that the new function name may be too long and cause issues.

2026-03-05.patch_summary: The patch moves the reclaiming of a single block group into its own function, but the name is too long and may cause issues.
